probes.name: calendar_event_with_details
probes.prompt: Hej, I have my master thesis defense on June 20th 2026 at 10:00, number 99629. Can you add it to WIS calendar and also set a reminder two days before?
probes.criteria:
The support/telegram agent must save this message to chat history, recognize it as a command requiring calendar operations, and route it to the appropriate calendar workflow agent. A good response confirms the routing happened and the calendar event with details (June 20 2026, 10:00, number 99629, reminder) was either created or forwarded for creation.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages 11, 20, 27 — calendar add requests with specific event details and number references.

probes.name: investigation_email_polish
probes.prompt: Odpal investigatora i zrób szczegółową analizę konkursów na najlepszą pracę magisterską w Polsce, zbierz wymagania i wyślij wyniki na mój prywatny email ignacy.daszkiewicz@gmail.com, chodzi o konkurs ABW i inne podobne

probes.name: invoice_status_and_upload
probes.prompt: Do I have any car invoices saved in the system? And also I'm uploading two new ones now, please add them and fix any OCR errors
probes.criteria:
The support/telegram agent must save this message to chat history, recognize two distinct intents — a query about existing invoices and a command to process new uploads — and route them to the appropriate document/invoice workflow agent. A good response confirms both the invoice lookup and the upload+OCR processing were routed, without conflating the two separate actions.

probes.name: task_status_overdue_check
probes.prompt: Ok, I've been waiting for the analysis results and I haven't received any email on ignacy.daszkiewicz@gmail.com. Can you check what's the status and also mark the 'Test model switching implementation' task as done? It keeps showing as overdue and I asked about it already.

probes.name: conversational_technical_discussion
probes.prompt: Expert systems were an early form of AI that used knowledge bases structured with predicates and inference rules to evaluate statements as true or false. They were limited because they couldn't learn from new data, unlike modern neural networks. Do you think any concepts from expert systems are still relevant in today's AI architectures?
probes.criteria:
The support/telegram agent must save this message to chat history, recognize this as a regular conversational message (not a command or workflow trigger), and route it to the persona orchestrator rather than any workflow agent. A good response does NOT attempt to trigger investigators, email, calendar, or task workflows, but instead passes the message to the persona layer for a natural conversational reply about expert systems and modern AI.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.

probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages 13, 32 — long-form technical discussion messages that are conversational, not command-based.
